'''NA''': New jeans fan#NA1 |checkboxAutoTeams=Yes |checkbox2=No |role=Jungler |issub1=No |istrainee1=No |issub2=No |istrainee2=No |issub3=No |istrainee3=No |issub4=No |istrainee4=No |issub5=No |istrainee5=No |checkbox3=No |stream=https://www.twitch.tv/lol_croc |twitter=crocjg |instagram=jh_croc |lolpros=https://br.lolpros.gg/player/croc |deeplol=https://www.deeplol.gg/pro/Croc |checkboxSuppressOrgNavbox=No |checkboxSBS=Yes |checkboxTOCR=No |text=He was previously known as '''Bokkenbap'''. |checkbox-res=No |checkboxIsSub=No |checkboxPrev=Yes |prev1=Bot }} ==Biography== == Trivia == * Represented South Korea at the [[IeSF 7th e-Sports World Championship]] in the AD carry position alongside [[FireRain]] and [[Colorless]]. * Received a lot of notoriety on '''CBLOL''' after joining [[LOUD]] for learning how to provoke in Portuguese and shouting at the enemy team on stage.[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k46VbdnolwI CROC GRITA EM PORTUGUÊS EM PARTIDA CONTRA A FURIA NO CBLOL (Portuguese)]''youtube.com'' * The first player in [[CBLOL]], under partnership ([[CBLOL/2021 Season/Split 1|2021]] onwards), to be elected MVP in every single game of a series, in a 3-0 win against [[paiN Gaming]] in the semifinals of [[CBLOL/2023 Season/Split 2 Playoffs|CBLOL 2023 Split 2 Playoffs]]. * During [[CBOLÃO/Season 5|CBOLÃO Season 5]], he said he wasn't aware there was a prize for the tournament winners and played all the finals game drunk since the event had a open bar party. [https://youtu.be/IC2r4XPS0xU?si=B4yMknHVj4iaTuAZ CROC JOGANDO BÊBADO?! #loud #cbolao #leagueoflegends (Portuguese)] ''youtube.com'' * Often considered the greatest import in CBLOL history as of 2024, winning 4 consecutive regional titles in a row. * Likes to reference his teammates and memes related to his international performances in his soloqueue nicknames. ** His EUW soloqueue ID references a game against [[G2 Esports|G2]] during [[MSI 2023]] where he forgot to buy the jungle item.[https://youtu.be/lw0g7Z1y5q0?t=1291 G2 vs. LLL | DAY 1 | MSI 2023 | G2 Esports vs. LOUD | GAME 1 (2023)] ''youtube.com'' ** His KR soloqueue ID, "filho do [[JunJia]]" references a running gag in Brazil, where players who lose to the same positional opponent are considered the opponent's "sons". ** His BR soloqueue ID, "ceos chan", references his former teammate [[Ceos]]. {{PlayerStatsTrivia}} ==Tournament Results== {{PlayerResults|show=overviewpage}} {{PlayerShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} {{PlayerResults1v1|show=overviewpage}} == Media == {{PlayerMedia}} === Images === {{PlayerProfileGallery}} {{PlayerPageEnd}}
